summary: Tested iteration 143 Packages module enhancements (backend + frontend). Backend: 11/11 pytest tests PASSED covering accent-insensitive regex fix, role-branching on POST (admin→active / non-admin→pending), status-drop on PUT by operators, validation pending-list includes package_services, approve/reject endpoints flip status, and search excludes non-active. Frontend: customer flow verified end-to-end — PackagesResults page renders CoCo-Yams with 'Yaoundé' accent search, editable top bar (edit-search-btn + apply-edit-search), filters Sheet (Price/Delivery/Features) all working, customer denied /management/shipments, customer sidebar does NOT contain Shipments. Admin flow: sidebar HAS 'Shipments', /management/shipments renders as standalone page with shipment-filters-btn, grid/list views, 9 shipments visible. Package Management tabs & New-Service modal verified via code review (Cloudflare challenge blocked a 4th back-to-back browser run) — 5 tabs confirmed, no Shipments tab, modal has 'Admin approval required' banner and no Status field.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/package_services.py:116 — payload uses data.dict(exclude={'operator_id','operator_name','status'}) correctly dropping any client-supplied status at create. Role branching at line 119 is correct.
routes/package_services.py:245-246 — update_service correctly drops 'status' for non-admin roles. Good defense-in-depth.
PackageManagement.jsx:502-506 — exactly 5 TabsTrigger entries (dashboard/services/bookings/communications/analytics). Shipments tab correctly removed.
PackageServicesTab.jsx:166-167 & 352-360 — status field removed from payload and 'Admin approval required' banner shown on create. Good UX.
Minor: PackagesResults URL-decoding of 'Yaound%C3%A9' works correctly; regex is now accent-insensitive in both directions (stored-accent ↔ typed-no-accent).

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (blocked by Cloudflare on final tab+modal check; code-review verified)

test_credentials: Per /app/memory/test_credentials.md — admin@test.com, superadmin@oryno.com, customer@test.com, operator@test.com all with testpassword123
seed_data_creation: Test cases create transient PackageServiceOffering rows prefixed TEST_ and clean them up via DELETE in finally blocks. CoCo-Yams Shipping LTD in db.package_services (Yaounde→Douala, active) remains the pre-existing seed used for search validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints verified via pytest. Frontend: customer PackagesResults + edit bar + filters + shipments access denial + sidebar — all confirmed working. Admin sidebar + /management/shipments standalone page — confirmed working. PackageManagement tabs=5 (no Shipments) and new-service modal with approval banner / no Status field confirmed via code review. If re-testing frontend, be aware Cloudflare challenges kick in on ~4th back-to-back navigation; wait 30-60s between runs or use a single session.
